narrative:
Greenhills B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 1,037 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.1%, a modest Republican lean of 5.0 percentage points.
